props.name: autoClose
props.description:
Configure the auto close behavior of the dropdown:
- `true` - the dropdown will be closed by clicking outside or inside the dropdown menu.
- `false` - the dropdown will be closed by clicking the toggle button and manually calling hide or toggle method. (Also will not be closed by pressing esc key)
- `'inside'` - the dropdown will be closed (only) by clicking inside the dropdown menu.
- `'outside'` - the dropdown will be closed (only) by clicking outside the dropdown menu.

props.name: container
props.description: Appends the vue dropdown menu to a specific element. You can pass an HTML element or function that returns a single element. By default `document.body`.

props.name: dark
props.description: Sets a darker color scheme to match a dark navbar.

props.name: direction
props.description: Sets a specified  direction and location of the dropdown menu.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Toggle the disabled state for the component.

props.name: offset
props.description: Offset of the dropdown menu relative to its target.

props.name: placement
props.description: Describes the placement of your component after Popper.js has applied all the modifiers that may have flipped or altered the originally provided placement property.

props.name: popper
props.description: If you want to disable dynamic positioning set this property to `true`.

props.name: popperConfig
props.description:
A Popper.js configuration object, or a function that receives the default
configuration and returns a modified one, used to customize the
positioning of the dropdown menu.

props.name: reference
props.description:
Sets the reference element for positioning the Vue Dropdown Menu.
- `toggle` - The Vue Dropdown Toggle button (default).
- `parent` - The Vue Dropdown wrapper element.
- `HTMLElement` - A custom HTML element.
- `Ref` - A custom reference element.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Sets which event handlers you’d like provided to your toggle prop. You can specify one trigger or an array of them.

props.name: variant
props.description: Set the dropdown variant to an btn-group, dropdown, input-group, and nav-item.

props.name: visible
props.description: Toggle the visibility of dropdown menu component.

events.name: hide
events.description: Callback fired when the component requests to be hidden.

events.name: show
events.description: Callback fired when the component requests to be shown.
